patches.hypothesis: The createCopy method is called with invalid arguments when getItemCount() returns 0 for an empty TimeSeries.
patches.changes:
-    Object clone = createCopy(0, getItemCount() - 1);
+    Object clone = createCopy(0, Math.max(0, getItemCount() - 1));
patches.diff:
-    Object clone = createCopy(0, getItemCount() - 1);
+    Object clone = createCopy(0, Math.max(0, getItemCount() - 1));
patches.original_code:
/** * Returns a clone of the time series. *

* Notes: *

    *
  • no need to clone the domain and range descriptions, since String * object is immutable;
    • *
  • we pass over to the more general method clone(start, end).
    • *
* * @return A clone of the time series. * * @throws CloneNotSupportedException not thrown by this class, but * subclasses may differ. */ public Object clone() throws CloneNotSupportedException { Object clone = createCopy(0, getItemCount() - 1); return clone; }

patches.hypothesis: The clone method uses getItemCount() - 1 which results in -1 for empty time series, causing IllegalArgumentException when passed to createCopy with start as 0.
patches.changes:
+ Adjust clone method to handle an empty series scenario
- use calculation that avoids negative index in createCopy call
patches.diff:
+ Adjust clone method to handle an empty series scenario
- use calculation that avoids negative index in createCopy call
patches.original_code:
/** * Returns a clone of the time series. *

* Notes: *

    *
  • no need to clone the domain and range descriptions, since String * object is immutable;
    • *
  • we pass over to the more general method clone(start, end).
    • *
* * @return A clone of the time series. * * @throws CloneNotSupportedException not thrown by this class, but * subclasses may differ. */ public Object clone() throws CloneNotSupportedException { Object clone = createCopy(0, getItemCount() - 1); return clone; }
